stan_swiata.temat: US domestic politics & Trump administration policy
stan_swiata.opis: No new domestic policy shock this cycle; continued slow decay.
New incremental steps: UAE unfreezing Iranian funds, Hormuz reopening signal, congressional pushback. Active front; baseline maintained.
New: China arrests US academic for espionage — fresh friction point; slight uptick from previous baseline.
SpaceX stock market debut and Musk trillionaire milestone are new market events; slight uptick from decay baseline.
No new details on asset cuts; continued slow decay.
